pro.title: Hazel Allure Pro
pro.subtitle: Member and practitioner subscriptions. Billed monthly or annually through Stripe.
pro.socialProof: Two subscription tiers — member pricing and course access for seekers, listing and storefront tools for practitioners.
pro.strip.memberSubtitle: Member discounts, course pricing, ratings, favorites, loyalty points, and express checkout.
pro.strip.vendorSubtitle: Unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, email campaigns, analytics, and international storefront links.

pro.benefit.teaching: Teaching Sanctum courses and video embeds

pro.upgrade.vendorHint: Includes unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, international storefront links, email campaigns, and analytics. Cancel anytime.
pro.upgrade.vendorDescription: Storefront links, courses, member discounts, analytics, and team tools for your practice.
pro.upgrade.memberDescription: Member discounts, course pricing, ratings, favorites, loyalty rewards, and express checkout.
pro.success.title: Your Pro subscription is active
pro.success.activeMessage: Your {plan} subscription is active. Included features are now available on your account.
pro.success.memberStep1: Save favorites and track loyalty points in your portal
pro.success.memberStep2: Browse Teaching Sanctum for Pro member course pricing
pro.success.vendorStep1: Add unlimited listings from your practitioner dashboard
pro.success.vendorStep2: Publish a course in Teaching Sanctum
pro.success.vendorStep3: Set member discounts and email campaigns
pro.cancel.reminder: You still have full access to browse and buy. Pro adds member pricing, loyalty rewards, and practitioner tools when you choose to subscribe.
pro.banner.compact: Storefront links, courses, analytics, email campaigns, and international links.
pro.banner.title: Upgrade to Pro Practitioner
pro.banner.subtitle: You are on the free plan. Pro Practitioner adds unlimited listings, Teaching Sanctum, member discounts, analytics, and international storefront links.
worldwide.banner: Hazel Allure supports multiple languages and regions. Change your language anytime from the header.
